series_metadata.series_description: Records generated by agreements and standards pertaining to OOD specific web content to document the look; feel; update frequency; tools and technology for the extranet, intranet and internet. These records are constantly updated, superseded or become obsolete. Records may include: List of standards; agency designations for committees & content providers; and any additional record generated to document the current use and status.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Maintain most current version. outdated or superseded records when no longer of administrative value
